body:
## Summary

Fixes #29 by defaulting large repository-mode uploads to shared `private-logs` / `public-logs` repositories, reusing the old generated repository name as the folder path, and skipping duplicate uploads when that folder already exists.

This PR also keeps the legacy dedicated-repository behavior behind `--no-shared-repository` / `GH_UPLOAD_LOG_SHARED_REPOSITORY=false` / `useSharedRepository: false`, updates `lino-arguments` to `^0.3.0`, and adds the requested issue dossier under `docs/case-studies/issue-29/`.

## How To Reproduce

1. Take a log file larger than 25MB.
2. Before this PR, repository-mode uploads created a dedicated repository derived from the file path.
3. After this PR, the same upload goes into `{user}/private-logs/<generated-folder>` or `{user}/public-logs/<generated-folder>` by default.
4. Re-uploading the same large file path now returns the existing shared-repository entry instead of pushing a duplicate.
5. If you need the old behavior, run `gh-upload-log ... --only-repository --no-shared-repository`.

## Validation

- `bun test test/index.test.js test/cli.test.js`
- `bun test`
- `bun run check`
- Added regression coverage for shared-repository routing, duplicate detection, and the legacy dedicated-repository fallback.
- Added CLI dry-run coverage for default shared repositories and `--no-shared-repository`.

## Case Study And Evidence

- [Issue 29 case study](https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/blob/issue-29-ab70a4a6a817/docs/case-studies/issue-29/README.md)
- [Issue payload](https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/blob/issue-29-ab70a4a6a817/docs/case-studies/issue-29/issue-details.json)
- [Recent CI log](https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/blob/issue-29-ab70a4a6a817/docs/case-studies/issue-29/ci-run-24886438137.log)
- [Latest lino-arguments package metadata](https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/blob/issue-29-ab70a4a6a817/docs/case-studies/issue-29/lino-arguments-package.json)
- [Related merged PR 28 metadata](https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/blob/issue-29-ab70a4a6a817/docs/case-studies/issue-29/related-pr-28.json)
